bio: I'm a passionate <primary>Backend Engineer</primary> with over 5 years of experience building robust, scalable systems that power modern applications. My journey in tech has been driven by curiosity and a commitment to excellence.

As a <secondary>Cybersecurity Analyst</secondary>, I bring a security-first mindset to every project. I believe that great software isn't just about features — it's about building systems that are resilient, secure, and maintainable.

I specialize in designing distributed architectures, optimizing database performance, and implementing security best practices. Whether it's crafting elegant APIs or fortifying systems against vulnerabilities, I approach each challenge with creativity and precision.

highlights.title: Backend Architecture
highlights.description: Designing scalable microservices and distributed systems

highlights.title: Cybersecurity
highlights.description: Securing applications and infrastructure against threats

highlights.title: Database Expert
highlights.description: Optimizing queries and managing complex data relationships

highlights.title: Clean Code
highlights.description: Writing maintainable, testable, and well-documented code

highlights.title: Performance
highlights.description: Optimizing systems for speed and efficiency at scale

funFact: When I'm not architecting new systems or securing applications, you'll find me gaming with friends or exploring new destinations while traveling.
